title: [codex] add gw kv2 int7 non-record submission
author: gwskier11-design
quantization: mixed int8/int7 with int6 fallback and fp16 ablation

data.description: Reduced key/value heads from 4 to 2 and increased MLP width to reallocate parameter budget.

data.scope: model weights with grouped export; K/V matrices explicitly quantized via lowered keep-float threshold

data.description: Post-export coarsening on selected middle layers to reduce artifact size while preserving performance.

novel_contributions: Non-record clean-rules submission targeting the official 16MB track while being honest about lacking an H100 timed run.
Reduced KV heads from 4 to 2 and reinvested the saved budget into a wider MLP.
Lowered the quantizer keep-float threshold so small K/V matrices are actually quantized instead of silently exported as fp16.
Applied grouped int8+zlib export with selective int7 coarsening on layers 4 and 5.
Compared full-int8, int7, int6, fp16 tied-embedding, KV1, and 10-layer variants via local proxy runs.
